goal: Make the Gemini/Codex auto-review loop explicitly handle clean, pending, blocked, and two-round states.
assumptions: codex-cli handles one Gemini review payload at a time.
GitHub Actions labels own cross-review loop state.
Duplicate Gemini requests are prevented by skipping codex auto-fix commits in gemini-review-kickoff.
risks: Gemini may not respond to every review request.
Self-hosted runners may have stale globally installed codex-auto-fix binaries.
